AR1.justification: Routed to observations.md with explicit in-band rationale structured as Sample-and-confound / Falsifier / Definition — frames the entry as descriptive-not-established ('before treating this as established') and reserves the forward-tracking suggestion for 'if this matters', preserving the observation-not-decision bar.

AR3.justification: No cross-references in the artifact; no daybook Log pointer to the observation that a methodology-shaped routing would carry.

AR4.justification: Section header is bare and undated; a re-run would overwrite the existing section rather than append a new ISO-dated entry as observations.md requires.
